title: uralepis fusca
side_effects: Uralepis fusca can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing liver damage due to its high concentration of hepatotoxic compounds. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, it may even cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat, high blood pressure, and cardiac arrhythmias. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, urealepis fusca can have serious and potentially life-threatening consequences.
